qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications of the 670 CPU nodes available on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Each of the 670 CPU nodes on the Rorqual cluster features 192 cores, 750 GB (or 768000 MB) of available memory, and 480 GB of storage provided by a 1 x SATA SSD (6 Gbit/s). They are powered by 2 x AMD EPYC 9654 (Zen 4) CPUs, clocked at 2.40 GHz with a 384 MB L3 cache, and do not include GPUs.

qa_pairs.question: What CPUs are installed in the 670 nodes of the Rorqual cluster, and how many cores do these nodes have?
qa_pairs.answer: The 670 nodes of the Rorqual cluster are equipped with 2 x AMD EPYC 9654 (Zen 4) CPUs, each operating at 2.40 GHz with a 384 MB L3 cache. Each of these nodes provides a total of 192 cores.
